05/21/2026
REGULATED INDUSTRIES

Toggles flag this customer for downstream QA / documentation requirements. Each can be set independently.

FDA-regulated
Medical device or pharma. Triggers QA review of capability fit on every related lead.
AS9100 / aerospace
Aerospace certified work. Affects part documentation requirements.
IATF 16949 / automotive
Automotive supplier. Drives PPAP requirements + traceability rigor.
ITAR-controlled / defense
Export-controlled defense work. Gates ITAR clearance on every related lead.
